chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated I am looking for tech enabled companies providing compliance and risk solutions to banks, community banks/lenders, and credit unions. The solutions may be related to vendor third party risk management, Bank Secrecy Act (BSA), Anti-Money Laundering (AML), loan review, fair lending, and complaint management. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US). Exclude: Consulting

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
